title: Research: multi-agent system vulnerability research
content:
MCP issues detected. Run /mcp list for status.I will search for multi-agent system vulnerability research on arXiv and GitHub to find the top 5 relevant results.
Here are the top 5 results for multi-agent system vulnerability research from arXiv and GitHub:

1. **Prompt Infection: LLM-to-LLM Prompt Injection within Multi-Agent Systems**
   - **URL:** [https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.09002](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.09002)
   - **Description:** This paper introduces "prompt infection," a novel attack vector where malicious instructions self-replicate across interconnected agents. It demonstrates how a single compromised agent can spread malicious payloads through a system, acting similarly to a computer worm.

2. **Security Considerations for Multi-agent Systems**
   - **URL:** [https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.09002](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.09002)
   - **Description:** A comprehensive research paper that provides a systematic taxonomy of MAS vulnerabilities. It evaluates popular frameworks ag
